title: Finance — NPV & IRR
description: Net present value, discounting, and project decision flowchart.

blocks.title: Decision rules
blocks.markdown:
| Metric | Accept if |
|--------|----------|
| NPV | NPV > 0 |
| IRR | IRR > r (cost of capital) |
| PI | PI > 1 |

blocks.title: Project screen
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[Estimate C_t] --> B[Choose r]
  B --> C[Compute NPV]
  C --> D{NPV > 0?}
  D -->|Yes| E[Accept / rank]
  D -->|No| F[Reject]
